statement: Oracle harness only. NO interpreter semantics implemented. NO conformance claimed.

spec.role: SEMANTIC ORACLE (authoritative). The official reference interpreter and the official test/core .wast files are the external oracle; we author no expected outputs.

wabt.role: TOOLCHAIN ONLY (format conversion via wast2json). NOT the semantic oracle.

conversion.features: DEFAULT - no --enable-* proposal flags. Integer-core only. Default features act as a SCOPE GUARDRAIL: they reject out-of-scope proposal syntax (e.g. typed function references) rather than silently converting it.

excluded.name: local_tee.wast
excluded.reason: At pinned spec commit 82cd4f9, local_tee.wast (lines 615/618) uses typed function-references syntax `(func $f (param (ref null $t)))` / `(ref.null $t)`. wast2json under DEFAULT (integer-core) features rejects it; it converts only with --enable-function-references, a reference-types proposal outside M0 integer-core scope. Excluded EXPLICITLY (not silently skipped) per the no-silent-skipping invariant. Revisit when reference types enter scope in a later milestone.
